name: Blue Ribbon Strawberry Pie
recipeIngredient: PET RITZ Deep Dish Pie Crust (1 each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Bake pie shell according to directions for an empty baked crust. Allow to cool.
3. Chop one cup of strawberries.
4. In a 2-quart saucepan, combine sugar and cornstarch. Stir in water gradually until smooth.
5. Add chopped strawberries to the mixture. Cook, stirring constantly, until it thickens and boils.
6. Remove from heat and stir in red food coloring. Allow to cool in refrigerator for 30 minutes.
7. Pour three-quarters of the syrup into the prepared pie crust. Place the remaining strawberries in the pie crust, reserving about one-fourth cup (about three large strawberries) for garnish.
8. Pour the remaining syrup over the strawberries. Chill until firm, about 3 hours.
9. To serve, top each slice with Whipped Topping and a slice of reserved strawberry.
